name: Poetry: Ozymandias & The Patriot
description: Analysis of themes, symbols, and literary devices in Percy Bysshe Shelley's Ozymandias and Robert Browning's The Patriot.

name: Poetry: Nine Gold Medals & Daffodils
description: In-depth study of David Roth's Nine Gold Medals and William Wordsworth's Daffodils, focusing on empathy, human spirit, and nature.

name: Prose: Chief Seattle's Speech
description: Historical context, environmental messages, and style analysis of Chief Seattle's famous 1854 speech.

name: Prose: The Hearts and Hands & A Face in the Dark
description: Detailed look at O. Henry's twist ending in Hearts and Hands and Ruskin Bond's supernatural elements in A Face in the Dark.

name: Drama: The Merchant of Venice Act I & II
description: Character study of Antonio, Bassanio, Portia, and Shylock. Understanding the bond story and casket test.

name: Drama: The Merchant of Venice Act III, IV & V
description: Analyzing the trial scene, mercy speech, and ring resolution.
